coordination_note: Coordination for the approve-gate task: this pass surfaces 5 truly-unresolved edges corresponding to 5 proposed manifest rows (FRE-LPP-033, FRE-LPP-034, FRE-LPP-035, FRE-LPP-036, FRE-LPP-037). These are CURRENT active Fremantle LPPs that are real corpus gaps. The propose-gate task should NOT need to re-run ingest for these — they are unapproved and will not be citable until acquire+extract+approve is performed. The unresolvable_by_design edges are also out of the approval-gate's scope (withdrawn PBs, predecessor schemes, etc.).
